'''Lamaro''' was the primary [[Star/Legends|star]] of the [[Lamaro system]].<ref name="BL" /> It was visible in the sky of the third [[Planet/Legends|planet]], [[Lamaredd/Legends|Lamaredd]].<ref name="R">{{GamerCite|7|Reckonings}}</ref>
